title: post api actions getgoals returns active goals
description: Verify that POST /api/actions/getGoals returns a 200 status with an array of active goals and that the goals are correctly displayed for user review.

title: post api actions creategoal creates new goal with valid data
description: Test POST /api/actions/createGoal with valid authenticated payload including userId, title, description, thrustArea, and kpis results in 200 response with created Goal, and the goal is persisted in SQLite and retrievable via getGoals.

title: post api actions creategoal rejects invalid or unauthenticated requests
description: Ensure POST /api/actions/createGoal with missing or invalid authentication returns a 4xx error and no goal is created in the database.

title: post api actions updategoalstatus updates status with valid data
description: Validate that POST /api/actions/updateGoalStatus with valid goalId, status, and managerEmail returns 200 with updated status object, changes the goal status, and logs approval or rejection correctly.

title: post api actions updategoalstatus rejects invalid or unauthorized requests
description: Confirm that POST /api/actions/updateGoalStatus with invalid goalId or unauthorized request returns an error response and the goal status remains unchanged.

title: post api actions batchupdategoalstatus bulk updates multiple goals
description: Test POST /api/actions/batchUpdateGoalStatus with multiple valid goalIds and status returns 200 with bulk update result and all matching goals are updated accordingly.

title: post api actions batchupdategoalstatus handles invalid goalids appropriately
description: Verify POST /api/actions/batchUpdateGoalStatus with one or more invalid goalIds returns an error or partial failure response and only valid updates are applied or the entire batch is rejected based on validation logic.

title: post api actions getcheckins retrieves all checkins
description: Check that POST /api/actions/getCheckIns returns 200 with an array of all saved check-ins for review.

title: post api actions savecheckin upserts checkin with valid data
description: Ensure POST /api/actions/saveCheckIn with valid goalId, quarter, actualAchievement, managerFeedback, and employeeEmail returns 200 with saved CheckIn and persists or updates the record correctly.

title: post api actions savecheckin rejects invalid or unauthorized requests
description: Confirm POST /api/actions/saveCheckIn with invalid goalId, malformed achievement data, missing employeeEmail, or unauthorized request returns an error and no check-in is saved or updated.
